# Software Craft Communities Worldwide

A directory of Software Craft communities and conferences worldwide.

## Primary pages
- https://www.softwarecrafters.org/
- https://www.softwarecrafters.org/conferences.html

## Machine-readable data
- https://www.softwarecrafters.org/conferences.json
- https://www.softwarecrafters.org/conferences.js
- https://www.softwarecrafters.org/conferences.ics
- https://www.softwarecrafters.org/communities.json
- https://www.softwarecrafters.org/communities_schema.json
- https://www.softwarecrafters.org/conferences_schema_v2.json

## Canonical source
- https://github.com/softwarecrafters/website
